headline: Resmed Divests MatrixCare Business to Sharpen Focus on Connected Care
summary: RMD's MatrixCare sale sharpens its focus on sleep, breathing and connected care while freeing resources for AI-powered digital health.

headline: Jefferies Maintains Hold on ResMed, Lowers Price Target to $225
summary: Jefferies  analyst Matthew Taylor   maintains ResMed (NYSE:RMD) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $240 to $225.

raw.headline: Jefferies Maintains Hold on ResMed, Lowers Price Target to $225

headline: ResMed (RMD) Sells MatrixCare To Refocus On Sleep And Respiratory Health
summary: ResMed (NYSE:RMD) has agreed to divest its MatrixCare business to a private equity buyer. The deal centers on refocusing the company around its sleep and respiratory health technologies and connected care platform. The transaction reflects a move away from post acute care software toward ResMed's core medical device and digital health operations. For investors watching ResMed, the exit from MatrixCare marks a clear effort to tighten the company’s focus on sleep apnea, respiratory care...
